title: Food++
description: A Minecraft mod that expands the food options in the game, introducing a wider variety of dishes!
body: ---- Are you tired of always having the same foods in your game? This mod adds the most varied types of food you can imagine including sweets, drinks and savory snacks! ***NOTE: Currently it is in alpha version containing only 13 different foods*** ## FAQ ***1. How to get the food?*** To get the food in creative mode to open the inventory which will have an exclusive tab just for them or in creative mode use the /give command ```/give @a morefoods:tomato``` ***2. Do you plan to add more foods?*** Yes! I plan to add over 100 foods! ***3. Do you plan to add foods recipes?*** Yep! ***4. Where can I see the list of available foods?*** Here! Foods List ## More Information - Made for Minecraft 1.21 - Fabric Only - Fabric Laucher above 0.16.3 - Project Source
